key.name: default-period
key.description: Period shown when extension opens (today, week, 30days, month, all)

key.name: budget-threshold
key.description: Daily budget threshold in USD. Set to 0 to disable.

key.name: budget-alert-enabled
key.description: Show warning when spending exceeds budget threshold

key.name: compact-mode
key.description: Show only icon in panel, hide cost label

key.name: force-dark-mode
key.description: Always use dark theme for the popup, regardless of system theme

key.name: show-exact-costs
key.description: Show full decimal values instead of compact notation (e.g. $2,655.23 instead of $2.7k)

key.name: codeburn-path
key.description: Custom path to the codeburn executable. Leave empty to use PATH.

key.name: provider-filter
key.description: Default provider to filter by (all shows everything)

key.name: disabled-providers
key.description: Providers excluded from cost accounting and display
